description: Well-known backend frameworks for Architect Console dropdowns. Loaded on first boot when scope=GLOBAL is empty for this category. AI / agent-oriented backends (LangChain / LangGraph) default to Python.

entries.name: NestJS
entries.description: Node.js / TypeScript framework; modular with DI, guards, pipes, interceptors.

entries.name: Spring Boot
entries.description: Java framework for REST APIs, data access, security.

entries.name: Django
entries.description: Python batteries-included framework; ORM, admin, auth.

entries.name: FastAPI
entries.description: Python async framework; Pydantic types, OpenAPI.

entries.name: Python
entries.description: Plain-Python default for AI / scripting modules; no framework assumed.

entries.name: LangChain
entries.description: Python framework for LLM application orchestration; chains, tools, memory. Uses Python as the implicit language.

entries.name: LangGraph
entries.description: Graph-based agent-workflow framework (Python); built on top of LangChain. Uses Python as the implicit language.
